title: zingiber galanga
intro: Zingiber galanga, also known as Kencur or Greater Galangal, is a plant species belonging to the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zingiber galanga include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the rhizome of Zingiber galanga is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being added to soups and sauces for its flavor and medicinal properties.
